findings.title: Hardcoded operator key and monitoring token
findings.description: Hardcoded OPERATOR_KEY and MONITORING_TOKEN string constants used for privileged authentication bypass

findings.title: std::hash used for password storage
findings.description: Non-cryptographic std::hash function used for password storage instead of a proper password hashing algorithm

findings.title: No rate limiting on login endpoint
findings.description: Login handler accepts unlimited authentication attempts without rate limiting or account lockout

findings.title: Hardcoded monitoring token bypasses authentication
findings.description: Token verification handler accepts hardcoded MONITORING_TOKEN as valid authentication

findings.title: Password reset token exposed in API response
findings.description: Password reset token returned directly in API response instead of being sent via email only
